CreateAnimal(AnimalRequest, string)

Creates (buys) a new animal based on the provided request and name.

Task<AnimalResponse> CreateAnimal(AnimalRequest Animal, string Name)

Parameters

Animal AnimalRequest

The request containing the animal type.

Name string

The name of the animal. This parameter is required.

Returns

Task<AnimalResponse>

The created animal.

CreateIniticalAnimals(Guid)

Creates the initial set of animals for the game. This operation should only be executed once.

A list of initial animals.
